tests.assertion: Tile, collision, prop, interaction, portal, lighting, and route domains commit atomically and interrupted commits roll back exactly.
Every changed gate preserves required goal and recovery reachability; a trapping gate is rejected without mutation.
Checkpoint, save reload, and migration preserve every authoritative domain and transaction ledger exactly.
Normal, replay, skip, and resume paths commit one durable cue effect and restore control.
Every released effect instance resolves through an effectId-specific typed transaction with complete parameter, precondition, postcondition, and rollback attestation.
NPC, dialogue, schedule, inventory, object placement, collision, and composition stay transactionally coherent.
Portal target, spawn, facing, checkpoint, carried state, collision safety, and return route close before commit.
Irreversible effects reject before their gates, commit once after the gate, and survive save reload without duplication.
All capabilities required by released patterns have an explicit adapter mapping and executable or typed fallback contract.
Positive benchmarks return exactly one core, at most three supports, no hard-vetoed selection, and typed handoffs.
Low-interaction and blocked-pack cases return a reasoned abstention with no selected application.
Held-out story produces a canon-safe, runtime-fit, original composition without a stored intended pattern ID.
